planner.description: Reads spec, produces technical implementation plan with plugin usage notes for downstream agents

builder.description: Follows plan, builds complete Next.js app. Uses /feature-dev for complex pages, /frontend-design for UI components, code-simplifier for cleanup

qa.description: Finds and fixes bugs. Uses code-reviewer, silent-failure-hunter, type-design-analyzer agents. Security hook auto-triggers on edits

designer.description: UI polish to Linear/Vercel quality. Uses /frontend-design for creative direction, motion guidelines, and anti-generic-AI-aesthetic rules

optimizer.description: Performance, SEO, accessibility. Uses code-simplifier for cleanup, comment-analyzer for docs, code-reviewer for final quality pass

deployer.description: Git, GitHub, Vercel deploy. Uses /commit for auto-generated messages, security hook for pre-flight vulnerability check
